# MyFitnessPal: Calorie Counter · Fitness

Generated: Jul 21, 2026, 7:09 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Sync and accounts](#theme-sync_accounts)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 6, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Ted Manuer_, Jul 20, 2026, 1/5: "App freezes. Wont even open most of the time. Freezes on opening logo. Used to be great, not sure what's wrong."
            2. _Rebekah Holt_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "App has become entirely unusable and seems to have spontaneously forgotten my account, now I can't log in or use it. It seems they've also locked the barcode scanner behind a pay wall, which definitely puts me off using it even if I do manage to regain access to my account! I used to recommend this to my friends, but I'll be warning them all to avoid now."
            3. _xXxMomokaxXx_, Jul 3, 2026, 2/5: "I've been using the app for years, albeit irregularly; many formerly free functions are now premiums like the food scanner. the app is also great buggy with the Garmin app :,)"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 10, 2026 - Jul 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _TROOPER685HD_, Jul 10, 2026, 2/5: "I have no idea who came up with the idea of ​​putting the barcode scanner behind a paywall (premium), but that makes the app useless"
            2. _Merissa Lucas_, Jul 20, 2026, 3/5: "it's just ok. I'm not going to pay for this, the price is insane. I only use it to count calories and protein. What is annoying about this app? Most prepackaged foods are not available on here or hard to find when I search them - Or, f they are available they will have several listed and they all have different calories and macros for the exact same product or item. Random people must be putting them in wrong."

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      3 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Rebekah Holt_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "App has become entirely unusable and seems to have spontaneously forgotten my account, now I can't log in or use it. It seems they've also locked the barcode scanner behind a pay wall, which definitely puts me off using it even if I do manage to regain access to my account! I used to recommend this to my friends, but I'll be warning them all to avoid now."
            2. _Kaathy_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I tried re-installing this app to use it again -but can't even get past the login, despite multiple attempts and resets. Seems very buggy and glitchy for me."
            3. _Jonas (Privat)_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "currently not able to login with newest update. Can't reset password, can't recognize Facebook login or Google login. I also couldn't create a new user."
